sglang.title: [BUGFIX] Skip Mamba Cache Slot 0 to Avoid Using Dummy Cache
sglang.author: Chen-0210
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
During CUDA Graph capture, dummy mamba cache may be written to slot 0.
self.free_slots in mamba_pool does not exclude slot 0. So slot 0 may contain garbage values at first if cuda graph is enabled.
Previously, this bug was hidden by the server-warm-up — ”The capital city of France is“.
Mo

vllm.title: [Benchmark] Don't default to `temperature==0` in `vllm bench serve`
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
vllm bench serve current sets temperature to 0 (greedy) in all requests if it's not explicitly provided in the benchmark command.
Thus results will not reflect the true default performance of a given deployment - where default sampling parameters are determined based on the model's configuration met

vllm.author: liranschour
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Enable NIXL Connector to us the new continuous cross layer KV cache layout described in RFC #27742 and implemented in #27743.
Demonstrate performance improvement of more the 2x in Tok/sec and TTFT due to dramatic reduction of fragmentation of transfer buffers.
Tested with P!=D with run_accur

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Whisper/encoder-decoder GPU memory leak
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix #31577.
Overview
For encoder-decoder models (e.g., Whisper), the encoder cache manager was returning newly allocated entries in get_freed_mm_hashes() during the same scheduling step they were allocated.
Since the runner frees cache entries before model execution, this caused encoder outputs free

Use this as the default when --api-server-count is not specified.

vllm.title: [torch.compile] Compile `CustomOp.forward_native` for `SiluAndMul` and `QuantFP8` to avoid raw torch ops inside opaque custom ops
vllm.author: ProExpertProg
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
When CustomOp.forward_native is invoked from within another opaque torch custom op (e.g. fused_moe, unified_attention), it is hidden from the model-level torch.compile. In this case, executing forward_native directly executes eager PyTorch ops, which can significantly hurt performance.
In th
